works_created.t: I'm Gonna Make You Love Me

about_quotes.speaker: Larry Gold
about_quotes.evidence: When you were working with Gamble and Huff and Thom Bell... I got more and more accepted into it. You know Kenny Gamble... he used to come to my studio... his son came and worked for me
about_quotes.doc_title: Larry Gold interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 18, 2025
